title: blechnum australe
intro: Blechnum australe, also known as the Rough Horsetail Fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Blechnum australe include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
